problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
